problem id: 318ddaa9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) OR SHR(4)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  00100011 -> 00010000
  11110100 -> 00101010
  00000001 -> 00000000
  01101100 -> 00100110
  10100010 -> 00010000
  10100110 -> 00010010
  11101000 -> 01000100
  11111001 -> 11001100

query: 00100100
predicted answer: 00000010
